tool.name: EnzyWizard Conservation
tool.description: Calculate residue sequence conservation from a cleaned protein sequence and MSA
tool.help:
**EnzyWizard-Conservation**
Calculates residue sequence conservation from a cleaned protein sequence and a user-provided multiple sequence alignment (MSA). Supports Stockholm, aligned FASTA, and A3M formats. Builds a profile HMM using HMMER and computes conservation scores based on HMM profile statistics.
**Inputs** - Cleaned protein sequence in FASTA format. - MSA file in Stockholm, aligned FASTA, or A3M format.
**Outputs** - Cleaned MSA in Stockholm format. - Profile HMM file. - JSON report with conservation scores.
For more information, see the `enzywizard-conservation` documentation: https://github.com/bioinfbrad/enzywizard-conservation
